text: Iran: The Israeli military said it had hit bases of Iran’s Islamic Revolutionary Guards Corps and the Basij militia in the western part of the country on Sunday. Abbas Araghchi, the foreign minister of Iran, told CBS News on Sunday that the country was not ready to negotiate with the United States, despite Mr. Trump’s saying the previous day that Iran wanted to make a deal. “We are ready to defend ourselves as long as it takes,” Mr. Araghchi told “Face the Nation.” At least 1,348 civilians in Iran have been killed since the start of the war, Iran’s U.N. representative told the Security Council on Wednesday, the latest figure the country has provided.
title: Iran War Live Updates: ‘No Guarantees’ Oil Prices Drop Soon, U.S. Official Says
